lane.last_task: Extract current Meta campaign analytics for video and retargeting static campaigns
lane.last_summary: Read-only extracted live Meta/CTWA cockpit analytics from https://hamzaexpress.in/api/ctwa-analytics?period=all at 2026-05-28T16:25:11+0530. Current active campaigns: primary video Maps campaign 120246002668360505 with 168350 impressions, 126689 reach, Rs2985.86 spend, 5369 link/outbound clicks, 2630 landing page views, CTR 3.78022, CPC Rs0.46918, CPM Rs17.736026, 31217 25pct video views, 16385 50pct, 9679 75pct, 5863 95pct, 15114 thruplays; static retargeting campaign 120246050386040505 with 43917 impressions, 36228 reach, Rs492.60 spend, 523 link clicks, 522 outbound clicks, 191 landing page views, CTR 1.530159, CPC Rs0.733036, CPM Rs11.216613. Directions bridge all-period readback: 3790 page views, 2856 unique visitors, 1647 total map opens. Archived April CTWA meta-status endpoint still points to 120243729366800505 archived, so current analysis used ctwa-analytics active-campaign payload.
lane.next_action: Use these exact current numbers for Meta readback. If deeper daily/adset export is needed, query Meta Graph directly or extend ctwa endpoint to expose retargeting daily trend; do not mutate campaigns/spend without fresh live verification.
lane.mutation_status: read-only analytics extraction; no Meta campaign/adset/ad, WABA, POS, Odoo, budget, customer-data, repo, or Figma mutation

recent_events.task: Correct Hamza Express Meta retargeting Figma creatives for visible food-first hero composition
recent_events.summary: Executed a Figma-only correction pass on the Hamza Express Meta + WABA retargeting creatives after review showed the food was not visible enough. Inspected the A1 frame structure and identified the causes: heavy global dark overlay, bottom readability panel covering the food zone, oversized headline/voucher/card/CTA stack, and hero image crop not centered on food. Updated all 10 individual Figma creative frames on page 06 Meta + WABA Ads by panning hero image rectangles toward the food, reducing overlay strength, lowering and lightening the readability layer, compressing headline/subline/voucher/CTA sizing, shrinking the voucher card, and keeping HE logo/emblem/1918 brand marks. Verified A1 9x16, A1 4x5, and A5 9x16 renders; food is now the dominant visual proof and WhatsApp voucher UI is secondary.
recent_events.next_action: Review all 10 corrected frames together in Figma, then do final copy/CTA polish and export only after approval. If further creative generation is required, first run Gemini/multimodal inspection on the canonical food references; do not mutate Meta spend or WABA flows without live verification.
recent_events.mutation_status: Figma design mutation only; no Meta campaign/adset/ad, WABA, POS, Odoo, budget, or customer-data mutation.

recent_events.task: Correct HE retargeting Figma creatives for food visibility
recent_events.summary: User flagged that food was not visible enough in the HE Meta WABA retargeting frames. Inspected A1 layer structure and found the issue: dark overlay at roughly 56 percent, bottom readability panel starting too high, and copy/voucher stack covering the food zone. Updated all 10 individual creative frames on Figma page 06 Meta + WABA Ads: panned hero image rectangles toward the food, reduced global overlay opacity, lowered the bottom readability overlay, compressed headline/subline/voucher/CTA sizing, and reduced voucher card height. Verified A1 9x16, A1 4x5, and A5 9x16 renders; food is now visibly dominant with the WhatsApp voucher module secondary.
recent_events.next_action: Continue from the corrected hero-food-first Figma frames; next QA should inspect all 10 variants together, then refine copy/CTA and export only after final approval. No Gemini generation yet unless explicitly requested.
recent_events.mutation_status: Figma design mutation only; no Meta campaign/adset/ad, WABA, POS, Odoo, or budget mutation.

recent_events.task: Rebuild Hamza Express Figma retargeting creative frames around hero imagery and import HE brand assets
recent_events.summary: Corrected the Figma work from board-style planning into separate individual Meta ad frames on HN Creative Asset Library v1 page 06 Meta + WABA Ads. Imported HE brand marks including full logo, icon/founder mark, emblem, text logo, wordmark, dark/light/no-bg/brown variants into brand reference board node 48:2. Analyzed PiSignage TV visual language from Hamza Express TV mission control: dark brown/gold base, 1918 heritage, Wahi Hamza Naam/Naya Zaiqa/Naya Andaaz, large food proof, compact voucher/action. Replaced temporary PiSignage contact-sheet placeholders in 10 creative frames with locked HE food hero assets: Ghee Rice + Dal Fry + Kebab, Ghee Rice + Butter Chicken + Kebab, full spread, Chicken Biryani + Kebab, Mutton Biryani + Kebab. Cleaned export issues: hid internal source notes, fixed CTA clipping, validated A1 9:16 render.
recent_events.next_action: Use these hero-first Figma frames as the editable control layer; next step is Gemini/multimodal inspection of selected canonical visual references and then final copy/variant polish before export. No Meta spend or WABA mutation yet.
recent_events.mutation_status: Figma design mutation only; no Meta campaign/adset/ad, WABA, POS, Odoo, or budget mutation.

recent_events.task: Create separate individual Figma creative frames for Meta WABA retargeting
recent_events.summary: After user clarified the production board was not the actual creative, created separate top-level Figma creative frames on page 06 Meta + WABA Ads, placed to the right of the board: HE Meta WABA A1-A5 in both 9:16 1080x1920 and 4:5 1080x1350. Each frame is an editable professional shell with brand chip, heritage chip, image placeholder, bucket label, headline/subline, voucher module, WhatsApp CTA, and format note. Fixed compressed 4:5 geometry and screenshot-validated A1 9:16 and A1 4:5. No asset upload, Gemini generation, Meta/WABA/Google spend, or customer mutation.
recent_events.next_action: Use Shift+2 on selected A1/A2/etc frame in Figma to view individual creatives. Next execution: shortlist and visually inspect canonical assets, then replace placeholders with approved food/outlet/voucher references in each creative frame.
recent_events.mutation_status: Figma design mutation only: created 10 individual creative frames and fixed 4:5 spacing; no paid media, WABA send, Google Ads, GBP, POS, Odoo, or customer mutation

recent_events.task: Execute first Figma production-board step for Meta WABA creative intelligence
recent_events.summary: Mutated Figma file RlpVhTqTghVyfp7vWt1Isz on page 06 Meta + WABA Ads. Rebuilt workspace frame 20:2 as 'Hamza Express Meta Ads - Retargeting Workspace / Production Board' at 2400x1720 with a professional Figma-led workflow: locked strategy, 6-step execution spine, retargeting bucket matrix, reference-control/Gemini inspection panel, editable creative output slots A1-A5, and QA checklist. Performed screenshot validation and fixed heading/body overlap. No Gemini generation, no asset upload, no Meta/WABA/Google spend/customer mutation.
recent_events.next_action: Shortlist 8-12 canonical assets into the production board buckets, visually inspect selected references, then create final Figma ad layouts A1-A5 in 9:16 and 4:5 after copy/asset approval.
recent_events.mutation_status: Figma design mutation only: rebuilt and validated frame 20:2 production board; no paid media, WABA send, Google Ads, GBP, POS, Odoo, or customer mutation

recent_events.task: Define professional Figma plus Gemini creative execution approach
recent_events.summary: Recommended a Figma-led creative production workflow for HE Meta/WABA retargeting: keep Figma as final editable design/control layer, use Gemini/multimodal only for reference inspection and selective image material generation, then assemble typography, hierarchy, voucher UI, brand marks, and export variants manually in Figma. Avoid treating Gemini output as finished ad design because final professional quality depends on layout system, copy hierarchy, spacing, contrast, proof/copy accuracy, and variant control.
recent_events.next_action: Build or refine the Figma production board under frame 20:2 with sections for audience buckets, canonical asset references, inspected visual notes, concept directions, final 9:16 and 4:5 layouts, and export checklist before any generation.
recent_events.mutation_status: strategy only; no creative generation, Figma mutation, Meta/WABA spend, Google Ads, POS, Odoo, or customer mutation

recent_events.task: Return to Meta WABA retargeting creative intelligence
recent_events.summary: Re-read HN Creative Asset Library README/context and meta-ads lane index. Confirmed 245 Meta-relevant canonical assets across HE brand core, Meta/WABA historical creatives, hero/dish assets, and outlet/product photos. Current creative intelligence direction: do not use old Meta creatives as proof of current offer/pricing; use them as layout/history only. Build new retargeting creative strategy around WABA voucher capture with primary buckets: hot click/directions visitors, warm page engagers, video viewers once audience creation is solved, nearby dine-in privacy/couples, family dine-in, daily takeaway breakers, and weekend Commercial Street visitors. Next execution should shortlist exact canonical asset paths for each bucket, visually inspect selected references, then assemble editable concepts in Figma frame 20:2 without generation until approved.
recent_events.next_action: Shortlist 8-12 canonical reference assets by bucket, inspect visually, then map each to copy angle and Figma creative slot before any image generation or Meta mutation.
recent_events.mutation_status: creative intelligence/read-only asset context only; no generation, no Figma mutation in this step, no Meta/WABA/Google spend or customer mutation

recent_events.task: Analyze current Google Ads campaigns against WABA voucher retargeting objective
recent_events.summary: Live-read Google Ads and cockpit state while working from Meta/WABA retargeting context. Confirmed two enabled Google Search campaigns: 23877692297 Hamza Hotel Late Night Brand Capture v2 at Rs250/day, 5km presence-only, 23:00-02:00, brand/Hamza intent; and 23882183242 Dish Late Night 2km Search v1 at Rs250/day, 2km presence-only, 23:00-02:00, dish/open-now/Shivajinagar intent. Both are Search footfall/directions campaigns, not WABA voucher-retargeting campaigns. Current Google landing already has WhatsApp as secondary, but primary action remains Maps/directions. Recommendation: do not mutate these existing campaigns into WhatsApp-first; keep them as clean late-night demand-capture tests and only add/measure WABA as secondary. Create a separate Google WABA/voucher capture campaign only if we explicitly allocate budget or later divert budget after first full 23:00-02:00 search-term readback.
recent_events.next_action: After tonight's full 23:00-02:00 window, inspect search terms and landing action events by campaign. If building Google-to-WABA capture, create a separate small voucher/WhatsApp campaign or landing variant instead of contaminating the current two footfall tests.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only live verification and strategy; no Google Ads, Meta, WABA, GBP, POS, or landing mutation

recent_events.task: Analyze Meta-Google-GBP bridge relevance for WABA retargeting
recent_events.summary: Explained that Meta, Google Ads, and GBP cannot directly share anonymous platform audiences. The practical bridge is first-party identity: Meta/Google/GBP drive users into owned WhatsApp/site flows, WABA captures phone numbers, then consented customer lists can be uploaded separately to Meta Custom Audiences and Google Ads Customer Match. GBP is useful for offer posts, profile trust, and performance signals, not user-level retargeting.
recent_events.next_action: If bridging is pursued, build one canonical HN audience ledger from WABA voucher claims and owned-site events, then sync consented phone/email audiences into Meta and Google Ads separately while using GBP posts/performance as local-intent support.
